info.name: S3 API Gateway
info.description:
Exposes an AWS S3-compatible REST API on top of your Nextcloud instance. External applications that store files via the S3 protocol (AWS SDKs, aws cli, MinIO client, Rclone, …) can use Nextcloud as a drop-in S3 replacement.
Authentication uses AWS Signature Version 4. Access key = Nextcloud username, secret key = a dedicated S3 secret configured in the app settings. Alternatively, admin-managed key pairs can be configured for shared or service-account access.
See https://github.com/johannesroesch/nc-s3api for full documentation.
info.author: Johannes Roesch
